accounting_policy_mechanics.revenue_recognition: ASC 606; initial franchise fees allocated between distinct performance obligations (pre-opening services) and deferred components. Revenue recognized when 4 criteria met: persuasive evidence, obligations provided, price fixed, collectability probable.
accounting_policy_mechanics.depreciation: Straight-line, 5-year useful lives (financial); accelerated methods (tax). Major renewals capitalized; maintenance expensed.
accounting_policy_mechanics.advertising_fund: Not addressed in notes — franchisor-level entity has no ad fund activity in period.
accounting_policy_mechanics.deferred_franchise_fees: $0 as of Dec 31, 2024. No franchise agreements executed.
accounting_policy_mechanics.impairment: Long-lived assets reviewed for impairment when events/changes indicate. No adjustments recorded.

parent_affiliate_structure: No parent/affiliate payables or receivables disclosed. Entity is standalone LLC with member contributions/distributions only.
tax_structure: LLC pass-through; ASC 740-10 for uncertain positions. No income tax liability.
subsequent_events: Evaluated through March 14, 2025. No material subsequent events.
key_finding: The financial statement notes confirm WKAF LLC is a shell entity with zero operations. All franchise operations are through the affiliate WorldKids Academy, LLC, which is NOT included in these financial statements.
